# @021.is/spine-i18n — LLM usage

> Hexagonal i18n: domain + ports + R2/fs/memory catalog adapters, CLDR plurals via Intl.PluralRules, React + server runtimes.

Install: bun add @021.is/spine-i18n

## Imports
- `import { makeLocale, negotiateLocale, makeMemoryCatalogStore } from "@021.is/spine-i18n"` — core
- `import { LocaleProvider, useT, useLocale, useFmt } from "@021.is/spine-i18n/react"` — React (peer: `react`)
- `import { getServerLocaleRuntime } from "@021.is/spine-i18n/server"` — server runtime
- `import { makeFsCatalogStore } from "@021.is/spine-i18n/fs"` / `makeR2CatalogStore` from `@021.is/spine-i18n/r2`

## API
Root (`.`):
- `makeLocale(tag)`, `normalizeTag(tag)`, `languageOf(locale)`; types `Locale`, `Catalog`, `PluralCategory`
- `negotiateLocale(input)` — pick a locale from urlLocale → cookieLocale → acceptLanguage → fallback
- `loadRuntime(store, locale, fallback?)` / `buildRuntime(primary, fallback)` → a `Runtime`
- `makeMemoryCatalogStore(...)` — in-memory `CatalogStore`; `validateCatalogs(input)`; `DEFAULT_POLICY`
- `Runtime` — `t(key, params?)`, `fmtNumber`, `fmtDate`, `fmtCurrency`, `locale`

`./react`:
- `LocaleProvider({ initial, children })`, `useT()` (bound `t`), `useLocale()`, `useFmt()`, `switchLocale(payload)`, `useRuntime()`

`./server`:
- `getServerLocaleRuntime(store, locale, fallback?)` — per-request `Runtime`

## Example
```ts
import { getServerLocaleRuntime } from "@021.is/spine-i18n/server";
import { makeFsCatalogStore } from "@021.is/spine-i18n/fs";

const store = makeFsCatalogStore("./src/i18n");
const rt = await getServerLocaleRuntime(store, "de", "en");
rt.t("auth.signin.title");                 // "Anmelden"
rt.t("auth.messages.unread", { count: 1 }); // uses the 'one' plural form
```

## Notes
- `react` + `@aws-sdk/client-s3` (for `/r2`) are optional peers. Ships a `spine-i18n` CLI bin.
- Catalogs: one JSON per BCP-47 locale (`en.json`, `pt-BR.json`) with `namespaces` + plural forms.
